contextSummary: dify-ui package DropdownMenu: full-part wrapper including a Menu.LinkItem sub-wrapper with a closeOnClick default for navigation entries in the LLM-app platform.

Next.js DevTools dev-overlay segment explorer: each route-segment row gets a boundary-override menu with `modal={false}`, a trigger that is disabled when the segment has no boundary, and `Menu.Portal container={shadowRoot}` so the popup stays inside the overlay's shadow DOM.
Propel design system's CustomMenu wraps Menu (old package name) behind a simplified API that exposes openOnHover; used across the project-management app for work-item and board row actions.
Resume builder's shared UI package: shadcn-style full-part dropdown-menu wrapper (Checkbox/Radio/Submenu/Group).

Product-analytics app chrome built directly on Menu: the account/org/project switcher and help menus use a Backdrop layer, nested SubmenuRoots (All projects / All organizations), render-prop triggers into PostHog's ButtonPrimitive, and a scroll-shadow popup capped by --available-height; a separate 'quill' package wraps full dropdown-menu + menubar primitives.
playground-ui design-system DropdownMenu for the AI agent playground; full part coverage including Checkbox and Radio items.

cmux marketing-site split Download CTA: the left zone is a plain link, the right caret zone is a Menu.Trigger opening the platform list (items render as i18n Links, waitlist platforms grouped under a GroupLabel); selecting a waitlist item opens a dialog deferred by requestAnimationFrame so the same pointer gesture doesn't dismiss it.
T3 code product web app: full shadcn-style wrapper (data-slot conventions) including a createHandle re-export, derived from the Coss UI registry.

Gutenberg's next-gen packages/ui AlertDialog Storybook story embeds a controlled Menu ('Actions' -> Delete opens an AlertDialog; onConfirm closes the menu), demonstrating menu-to-dialog composition in WordPress's Base UI-based design system.
Electric sync-engine agents-server admin UI: Menu wrapper with Group/GroupLabel/Separator and submenus.
Coss UI registry menu.tsx: full-part wrapper including createHandle and LinkItem; the registry that t3code/kaneo variants derive from, distributed via shadcn-style JSON.
Chatbot-builder UI package's single-file Menu wrapper with submenu support behind a simplified API.

Send files and folders anywhere in the world without storing in cloud - any size, any format, no accounts, no restrictions: menu usage appears as a shadcn-style menu wrapper (web-app/src/components/ui/menu.tsx). Not inspected in depth.

FileContextMenu composes ContextMenu.Root/Trigger with Menu.Portal/Positioner/Popup/Item parts (cross-component part interop); the browser app also uses raw Menu parts for agent-selection menus and ships a stage-ui Menu wrapper.

The 'wax' rich-text editor's menu family: one slim file per part (container/trigger/item/submenu/radio-group/...), building the editor's toolbar dropdowns directly on Menu parts.

Playroom's frame/settings menus: one Menu.tsx drives top-level menus and submenus, with closeOnClick={false} on checkbox/radio settings items and onOpenChangeComplete to reset submenu state after the close animation.
Kaneo project-management app: shadcn-style full-part wrapper including a createHandle re-export (detached menu handles) plus a menubar wrapper.
Animate UI registry 'base menu' primitive: every Menu part (incl. Arrow) wrapped with motion/react springs, animating the popup via render props and AnimatePresence instead of CSS transitions.

Menubar recipe by a Material UI maintainer: Base UI Menubar + Menu with every item rendered into a Material UI MenuItem via render props (plus a SKILL.md teaching agents the integration).
